에스라 2:1.content: Now these are the children of the province, who went up out of the captivity of those who had been carried away, whom Nebuchadnezzar the king of Babylon had carried away to Babylon, and who returned to Jerusalem and Judah, everyone to his city;

에스라 2:2.content: who came with Zerubbabel, Jeshua, Nehemiah, Seraiah, Reelaiah, Mordecai, Bilshan, Mispar, Bigvai, Rehum, and Baanah. The number of the men of the people of Israel:

에스라 2:3.content: The children of Parosh, two thousand one hundred seventy-two.

에스라 2:4.content: The children of Shephatiah, three hundred seventy-two.

에스라 2:5.content: The children of Arah, seven hundred seventy-five.

에스라 2:6.content: The children of Pahathmoab, of the children of Jeshua and Joab, two thousand eight hundred twelve.

에스라 2:7.content: The children of Elam, one thousand two hundred fifty-four.

에스라 2:8.content: The children of Zattu, nine hundred forty-five.

에스라 2:9.content: The children of Zaccai, seven hundred sixty.

에스라 2:10.content: The children of Bani, six hundred forty-two.

에스라 2:11.content: The children of Bebai, six hundred twenty-three.

에스라 2:12.content: The children of Azgad, one thousand two hundred twenty-two.

에스라 2:13.content: The children of Adonikam, six hundred sixty-six.

에스라 2:14.content: The children of Bigvai, two thousand fifty-six.

에스라 2:15.content: The children of Adin, four hundred fifty-four.

에스라 2:16.content: The children of Ater, of Hezekiah, ninety-eight.

에스라 2:17.content: The children of Bezai, three hundred twenty-three.

에스라 2:18.content: The children of Jorah, one hundred twelve.

에스라 2:19.content: The children of Hashum, two hundred twenty-three.

에스라 2:21.content: The children of Bethlehem, one hundred twenty-three.

에스라 2:23.content: The men of Anathoth, one hundred twenty-eight.

에스라 2:25.content: The children of Kiriath Arim, Chephirah, and Beeroth, seven hundred forty-three.

에스라 2:26.content: The children of Ramah and Geba, six hundred twenty-one.

에스라 2:27.content: The men of Michmas, one hundred twenty-two.

에스라 2:28.content: The men of Bethel and Ai, two hundred twenty-three.

에스라 2:30.content: The children of Magbish, one hundred fifty-six.

에스라 2:31.content: The children of the other Elam, one thousand two hundred fifty-four.

에스라 2:32.content: The children of Harim, three hundred twenty.

에스라 2:33.content: The children of Lod, Hadid, and Ono, seven hundred twenty-five.

에스라 2:34.content: The children of Jericho, three hundred forty-five.

에스라 2:35.content: The children of Senaah, three thousand six hundred thirty.

에스라 2:36.content: The priests: the children of Jedaiah, of the house of Jeshua, nine hundred seventy-three.

에스라 2:37.content: The children of Immer, one thousand fifty-two.

에스라 2:38.content: The children of Pashhur, one thousand two hundred forty-seven.

에스라 2:39.content: The children of Harim, one thousand seventeen.

에스라 2:40.content: The Levites: the children of Jeshua and Kadmiel, of the children of Hodaviah, seventy-four.

에스라 2:41.content: The singers: the children of Asaph, one hundred twenty-eight.

에스라 2:42.content: The children of the gatekeepers: the children of Shallum, the children of Ater, the children of Talmon, the children of Akkub, the children of Hatita, the children of Shobai, in all one hundred thirty-nine.

에스라 2:43.content: The temple servants: the children of Ziha, the children of Hasupha, the children of Tabbaoth,

에스라 2:44.content: the children of Keros, the children of Siaha, the children of Padon,

에스라 2:45.content: the children of Lebanah, the children of Hagabah, the children of Akkub,

에스라 2:46.content: the children of Hagab, the children of Shamlai, the children of Hanan,

에스라 2:47.content: the children of Giddel, the children of Gahar, the children of Reaiah,

에스라 2:48.content: the children of Rezin, the children of Nekoda, the children of Gazzam,

에스라 2:49.content: the children of Uzza, the children of Paseah, the children of Besai,

에스라 2:50.content: the children of Asnah, the children of Meunim, the children of Nephisim,

에스라 2:51.content: the children of Bakbuk, the children of Hakupha, the children of Harhur,

에스라 2:52.content: the children of Bazluth, the children of Mehida, the children of Harsha,

에스라 2:53.content: the children of Barkos, the children of Sisera, the children of Temah,

에스라 2:54.content: the children of Neziah, the children of Hatipha.

에스라 2:55.content: The children of Solomon’s servants: the children of Sotai, the children of Hassophereth, the children of Peruda,

에스라 2:56.content: the children of Jaalah, the children of Darkon, the children of Giddel,

에스라 2:57.content: the children of Shephatiah, the children of Hattil, the children of Pochereth Hazzebaim, the children of Ami.

에스라 2:58.content: All the temple servants, and the children of Solomon’s servants, were three hundred ninety-two.

에스라 2:59.content: These were those who went up from Tel Melah, Tel Harsha, Cherub, Addan, and Immer; but they could not show their fathers’ houses, and their offspring, whether they were of Israel:

에스라 2:60.content: the children of Delaiah, the children of Tobiah, the children of Nekoda, six hundred fifty-two.

에스라 2:61.content: Of the children of the priests: the children of Habaiah, the children of Hakkoz, and the children of Barzillai, who took a wife of the daughters of Barzillai the Gileadite, and was called after their name.

에스라 2:62.content: These sought their place among those who were registered by genealogy, but they were not found: therefore were they deemed disqualified and removed from the priesthood.

에스라 2:63.content: The governor told them that they should not eat of the most holy things until a priest stood up to serve with Urim and with Thummim.

에스라 2:64.content: The whole assembly together was forty-two thousand three hundred sixty,

에스라 2:65.content: in addition to their male servants and their female servants, of whom there were seven thousand three hundred thirty-seven; and they had two hundred singing men and singing women.

에스라 2:66.content: Their horses were seven hundred thirty-six; their mules, two hundred forty-five;

에스라 2:67.content: their camels, four hundred thirty-five; their donkeys, six thousand seven hundred twenty.

에스라 2:68.content: Some of the heads of fathers’ households, when they came to Yahweh’s house which is in Jerusalem, offered willingly for God’s house to set it up in its place.

에스라 2:69.content: They gave according to their ability into the treasury of the work sixty-one thousand darics of gold, and five thousand minas of silver, and one hundred priests’ garments.

에스라 2:70.content: So the priests and the Levites, with some of the people, the singers, the gatekeepers, and the temple servants, lived in their cities, and all Israel in their cities.
